name: UsageReport
description: UsageReport schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Access Browser Management API

active_users.description: Number of unique active users during the period.

total_sessions.description: Total browser sessions started during the period.

data_transferred_gb.description: Total data transferred through the browser in GB.

threats_blocked.description: Number of threats blocked by the browser.

dlp_events.description: Number of DLP policy events triggered.

data_points.description: Time-series data points for the report.
